summary: Soundboard recording shows some thumping/popping, but the 1993 show shines – especially on the soaring Space jam and a killer Easy Answers.
review: The performance is generally praised as a high‑point of the ’90s era, with Garcia “playing like a god” and memorable moments like Space and Easy Answers. The soundboard source has a noticeable jangly/thumping character that detracts slightly from an otherwise terrific show.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers highlight strong musical moments, giving 4‑5 stars, but several note recording flaws and one reviewer gave a zero rating, pulling the weighted average down.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners report thumping/popping and a generally jangly sound; no mention of crisp or pristine clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall solid set with energetic improvisations; reviewers didn’t flag any pacing problems, though one felt there were no distinct highlights beyond the noted jams.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia is praised as “playing like a god” despite occasional health‑related inconsistency notes.
